title: Bayer Acquires Perfuse for $2.45B
headline: Bayer re-enters pharma M&A with its largest drug company acquisition since AskBio in 2020, buying mid-stage glaucoma therapy Perfuse Therapeutics.
key_facts: $300 million upfront, $2.45 billion total including milestones, Mid-stage glaucoma therapy, Also in development for diabetic retinopathy

title: Novo Nordisk Oral Wegovy $355M Q1 Sales
headline: Novo Nordisk's oral semaglutide (Wegovy pill) posts $355 million in first-quarter sales, prompting the company to raise full-year guidance.
key_facts: $355 million Q1 revenue for oral Wegovy, Oral GLP-1 competitive battleground vs. Lilly's orforglipron, Fast sales ramp signals strong demand

title: GSK Licenses SiRNA from SiranBio for $1B
headline: GSK licenses experimental oligonucleotide drug from China-based SiranBio for cardiometabolic diseases in a deal worth up to roughly $1 billion.
key_facts: Up to ~$1 billion deal value, Cardiometabolic therapeutic area, China-to-West licensing deal, Positioned in obesity drug lane

title: Sanofi Withdraws Tzield from FDA CNPV
headline: Sanofi requests withdrawal of its label expansion application for Tzield (teplizumab) from the FDA's Competitive New Product Voucher program.
key_facts: Tzield (teplizumab) type 1 diabetes, Label expansion application withdrawal, CNPV program, Previously approved April 2026 for young children

title: Lilly $4.5B U.S. Manufacturing Investment
headline: Eli Lilly announces $4.5 billion in new manufacturing projects across Indiana to expand capacity for GLP-1 and pipeline drugs.
key_facts: $4.5 billion manufacturing investment, Indiana facilities expansion, GLP-1 obesity and pipeline capacity buildout, Politically significant onshoring

title: Avalo Phase 2 Skin Win + $375M Raise
headline: Avalo Therapeutics scores a Phase 2 win for a dermatology drug and simultaneously raises $375 million as part of turnaround effort.
key_facts: $375 million financing raise, Phase 2 success in dermatology/skin indication, Concurrent capital raise during turnaround

title: White House Claims $529B MFN Drug Savings
headline: The White House touts $529 billion in projected savings from the Most Favored Nation drug pricing model over a decade.
key_facts: $529 billion savings projected over 10 years, MFN drug pricing model, Major policy overhang for pharma sector

title: Amgen, AbbVie Q1 Sales Hit by IRA
headline: Amgen and AbbVie report Q1 2026 sales directionally negative due to Inflation Reduction Act pricing negotiations.
key_facts: IRA pricing negotiations impacting Q1 sales, Directionally negative sales impact from drug price negotiations

title: UCB Acquires Candid for $2.2B Bispecifics
headline: Union for Competitive Benefit (UCB) acquires Candid Therapeutics for $2.2 billion, gaining portfolio of bispecific antibodies for autoimmune disease.
key_facts: $2.2 billion acquisition, Portfolio of bispecific antibody drugs licensed from China-based biotechs, Autoimmune diseases focus

title: Viridian TED Phase 3 Data Competitive
headline: Viridian reports new Phase 3 data in chronic thyroid eye disease that positions the drug more competitively vs. Amgen's Tepezza.
key_facts: Phase 3 data in chronic thyroid eye disease, More competitive positioning vs. Amgen's Tepezza, Earlier results had disappointed investors

title: Madrigal MASH Drug Beats Sales Expectations
headline: Madrigal's MASH therapy beats sales expectations in Q1.
key_facts: MASH (metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis) indication, Sales beat expectations
